mapper.sql: SELECT P.* FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM , PAGING.* FROM (
mapper.select: SELECT b.SUB_KEY FROM PM_TMPLET_MST a, PM_TMPLET_SUBKEY_MAP b WHERE 1=1 AND a.TMPLET_ID = b.TMPLET_ID AND a.SYNC_YN = 'Y' AND a.TMPLET_ID = '1'

WITH VAL_LIST AS ( SELECT distinct sub_key, SUBSTR( XMLAGG ( XMLELEMENT ( COL, ';', sub_val || ':' || sub_val) ORDER BY sub_val_seq ).EXTRACT('//text()').GETSTRINGVAL() , 2) bas_val FROM pm_tmplet_subval_map WHERE 1=1 AND TMPLET_ID = '1' GROUP BY sub_key ) SELECT B.SUB_KEY, B.SUB_VAL_TYP_CD, C.SUB_VAL AS SUB_VAL, B.SUB_VAL_SEQ, D.BAS_VAL FROM PM_TMPLET_MST A, PM_TMPLET_SUBKEY_MAP B, PM_TMPLET_SUBVAL_MAP C, VAL_LIST D WHERE 1=1 AND A.TMPLET_ID = B.TMPLET_ID AND B.TMPLET_ID = C.TMPLET_ID AND B.SUB_KEY = C.SUB_KEY AND B.SUB_KEY = D.SUB_KEY AND B.SUB_VAL_SEQ = C.SUB_VAL_SEQ AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.TMPLET_ID = '1'
